      children: "Meteor launched in 2012 and introduced many developers to the concept of full-stack JavaScript with real-time data. Over a decade later, the JavaScript ecosystem has matured, and the requirements for offline-capable, framework-agnostic applications have grown. RxDB offers a different approach: a dedicated local-first database that works with any backend, any frontend framework, and any storage engine, without requiring a full platform."

A WebSocket-based protocol called DDP (Distributed Data Protocol) keeps the two sides synchronized in real time."
